## What does this change?

<!-- A short summary of the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New / updated practice questions
- [ ] Feature or UI change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Chore / dependencies / CI

## Question-bank checklist (if you touched `src/data/questions/`)

- [ ] Questions stay at **fundamentals level** (AI-901 / AI-900 skills outline)
- [ ] Difficulty (`easy` / `medium` / `hard`) reflects scenario complexity, not
      out-of-scope knowledge
- [ ] Distractors are real, plausible Azure / AI terms (no invented services)
- [ ] Each question has an accurate `explanation` and a `refKey` to Microsoft Learn
- [ ] `npm run validate:bank` passes locally

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass
